name: @appstrate/bun-toolkit
description: Reference integration for `server.type: "bun"`. A self-contained, zero-dependency Bun MCP server exercising Bun-native APIs that prove it runs on the Bun runtime rather than node: an in-memory bun:sqlite key/value store (stateful across calls), Bun.CryptoHasher hashing, Bun.password argon2/bcrypt hash+verify, crypto.randomUUID, and a runtime self-report. It also declares an api_key auth with delivery.http so the sidecar's MITM proxy injects X-Toolkit-Token on the upstream-calling tool — proving credential injection works without the server code ever reading the secret. A generic api_call tool is attached alongside the native tools. Runs as a host subprocess in process mode (tier 0-2) and in the appstrate-mcp-runner-bun container in docker mode (tier 3).
author: Appstrate

apiKey.description: Any non-empty string. The integration never reads this value; the sidecar's MITM proxy injects it as the `X-Toolkit-Token` header on every upstream call from the `fetch_echo` tool and the generic `api_call` tool.
